headline: Wolfe Research Downgrades Danaher Corporation (DHR)

headline: Global Chromatography Market to Reach $21.50 Billion by 2031, Fueled by Biologic Purification Needs
summary: The global preparative and process chromatography market is anticipated to grow from USD 14.32 billion in 2026 to USD 21.50 billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 8.2%. This growth is driven by increased demand for vaccines, recombinant proteins, and personalized treatments, advancing chromatography as critical for biologics purification. headline: Everpure Jumps 34% in a Year: Should Investors Bet on the Stock?
summary: P gains 33.9% in a year, powered by surging subscriptions, high ROE, and upbeat 2027-2028 revenue and EPS estimates.
